fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Rhode Island Speech-Language Pathologist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Rhode Island - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: speech-language pathologist license reciprocity rhode island, how to transfer speech-language pathologist license to rhode island, speech-language pathologist compact rhode island, rhode island speech-language pathologist endorsement application

board.name: Board of Speech-Language Pathology and Audiology

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: Full credential for independent SLP practice in Rhode Island.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: For SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Submit Application
steps.description: Submit with fees to RI DOH.

telepractice_text: Rhode Island permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Rhode Island issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Rhode Island is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does a Rhode Island SLP license cost?
Is Rhode Island part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Rhode Island allow telepractice for SLPs?
Does Rhode Island have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers speech-language pathologist practice in Rhode Island. To work in Rhode Island, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to Rhode Island?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Rhode Island while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Rhode Island is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
